bookingSteps: Choose dates on Airbnb to confirm live price and availability.
Select guest count, with 7 guests as the listed maximum.
Review house rules, cancellation policy, safety notes, and final payment on Airbnb.
Keep payment and guest-host messaging inside Airbnb until a direct booking path is approved.
